backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing print job management, user profiles, label settings with layout/barcode positioning, serial number tracking, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three features related to fixing label layout, ensuring barcode visibility/scannability, and adjusting CPCL generation logic with proper spacing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend source files covering authentication, printing, label settings, diagnostics, state management, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Make Some Double barcode and label printing system, loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app with ErrorBoundary and PasswordSessionProvider, conditionally rendering LockScreen or AppShell based on session lock state.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand store managing sound settings (success/error/print-complete sounds, volume, custom sounds) with Web Audio API beep generation and custom audio playback functions.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Password session utilities for creating, retrieving, validating, and clearing localStorage-persisted sessions with 8-hour expiry and password validation against configured expected password.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider managing password session state with unlock/lock methods, session rehydration on mount, and validation against configured expected password.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell component with header, tabbed navigation (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics), footer, and lock button. Manages active tab state and renders corresponding tab content.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Displays a red badge with "Backend Unavailable" message when the backend is not reachable. Hidden when backend is available.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches rendering errors and displays a fallback UI with a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header component showing printer connection status badge and optional wake lock toggle switch to keep screen awake.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Displays print count statistics grouped by prefix mappings configured in label settings. Shows empty state if no prefix mappings exist.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: Component for configuring sound effects (success, error, print complete) with built-in and custom sound selection, upload, volume control, and test playback functionality.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Exports function to retrieve lock screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' or using VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD environment variable if set.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login, logout, and identity state management using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations: submitting print jobs, fetching print history, and increasing print counts. Handles backend availability tracking and IC error formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: React hook that manages the Screen Wake Lock API to prevent device screen from sleeping, with localStorage persistence and automatic re-acquisition on visibility change.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a dark warehouse theme with blue accents, including touch-friendly sizing (44px minimum) and focus states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates deterministic SVG barcode representations from serial data by creating alternating bar patterns based on character codes.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Validation and diagnostic logging utilities for barcode data, position, and height constraints with detailed error/warning reporting.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode types (CODE128, EAN13, etc.) to CPCL printer tokens with recommended width/ratio parameters and fallback handling for unsupported types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL printer command strings for labels, test prints, and calibration patterns with barcode positioning, scale clamping, and comprehensive validation logging.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within safe printable margins and estimate CODE128 barcode widths in dots to prevent label clipping.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a visual preview of label layouts with zoom controls, sample serial inputs, and applies calibration offsets and barcode positioning adjustments.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines unit conversion constants and functions for mm-to-pixels, dots-to-pixels, and mm-to-dots transformations used in CPCL printing and preview rendering.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password entry screen that unlocks the barcode/label printing system using the PasswordSessionProvider.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays an error screen when the password session system is not properly configured, with a refresh button.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer connection state, CPCL transmission, and test print functionality via WebUSB transport.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: WebUSB transport layer for CPCL printers, handling device discovery, connection management, bulk endpoint communication, and data transmission.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking backend availability status, last error messages, and success/error timestamps.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store tracking scan/print/error counts globally and per label type with prefix-based counters.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Zustand store for label settings with localStorage persistence, BigInt serialization, and migration support. Manages label dimensions, barcode layouts, prefix mappings, and calibration offsets with default values for 58mm × 43mm labels.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Zustand store for system logs with persistence, storing up to 1000 log entries with timestamps, levels (info/warn/error), and optional metadata. Exports hooks and functions for adding and retrieving logs.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Zustand store for print history with persistence, storing up to 1000 print entries with CPCL data. Provides reprint functionality that resends CPCL to the printer and logs the action.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that tracks whether the label settings store has finished hydrating from localStorage, allowing components to distinguish between unloaded and loaded-with-defaults states.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: React component for managing printer connections via USB with WebUSB support detection. Provides UI for connecting/disconnecting printers, displaying connection status, and sending test prints with error handling.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: React component with three tabs displaying system diagnostics: statistics (total scans, prints, errors by type), print history with reprint functionality, and filterable system logs.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: React component for configuring label settings including dimensions, barcode layouts, prefix mappings, calibration offsets, and sound effects. Supports import/export of settings, preview generation, test printing, and calibration pattern printing.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: React component for two-step serial scanning workflow with validation, duplicate detection, and automatic label printing. Handles prefix mapping, backend submission, printer communication, and comprehensive error handling with audio feedback.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validates barcode and layout settings for CPCL printers, checking barcode types, scales, heights, positions, and spacing to ensure barcodes will be visible and within label bounds.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Detects and formats Internet Computer operational errors, specifically IC0508 canister stopped errors, and provides user-friendly messages for backend unavailability scenarios.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and returns user-friendly messages for authorization, network, duplicate serial, and unknown prefix errors.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Handles import/export of label settings with BigInt serialization, migrates old settings structures to new layout-based format, and validates imported settings.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Provides centralized label type definitions with built-in types (dualBand, triBand, newDualBand), extracts custom types from prefix mappings, and generates display names.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats printer, transport, and backend errors into concise user-facing messages for the Scan & Print workflow, handling duplicate serials, unknown prefixes, and connection issues.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Normalizes scanned serial numbers by trimming whitespace and removing common barcode scanner suffix characters like CR, LF, and Tab.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Extracts and manages URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a label printing application fix request to resolve text/barcode overlap issues and ensure complete barcode visibility on 58mm × 43mm labels by adjusting CPCL generation logic.
